cases.prompt: Search the docs for the repository convention on environment variables.
cases.expected_behavior: Finds relevant documentation passages and conventions.

cases.prompt: Look through the project docs for guidance on deployment or handoff workflows.
cases.expected_behavior: Searches docs and surfaces the relevant references.

cases.prompt: Change the docs so they mention deployment.
cases.expected_behavior: This is a docs-edit request, not search.

cases.prompt: I vaguely remember a rule about code review in the docs; find it.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses documentation search to recover a remembered rule.
